attributes.additional_details: Share this petition and let's get a movement started
attributes.background: I believe that the country has spoken with the recent local elections, i don't believe that any leadership change within the labour party will fix the problems that we have in the UK right now... call a general election now!

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Dissolve Parliament and call a General Election now!
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/750050
